adapters.label: Grok Build
adapters.install_hint: Install Grok Build with the official installer: `curl -fsSL https://x.ai/cli/install.sh | bash` (macOS/Linux) or `irm https://x.ai/cli/install.ps1 | iex` (Windows PowerShell) — see https://docs.x.ai/build. Make sure `grok` is on PATH and run `grok login` (or set XAI_API_KEY for headless auth), then retry `coven adapter doctor grok`.
adapters.description: xAI Grok Build adapter. Finite one-shot headless runs via `--single=<prompt>` in Grok's plain output mode (`--output-format plain`, its own default): stdout carries only the final response text, reasoning is dropped at the source, and errors go to stderr — no event protocol or translation layer. Session pre-assignment via `--session-id`, cold-start resume via `--resume`. Permission mapping uses the argv-list sandbox form to drive both `--permission-mode` and `--sandbox`. No stream mode: every turn is a fresh process.
